name: Active Green + Ross
message: Active Green + Ross operates a chain of Complete Tire & Auto Centres across Southern Ontario, offering a wide selection of passenger and light truck tires from leading manufacturers. Their services include tire sales, automotive repairs, and maintenance for various vehicle models, with a focus on preventative maintenance and repairs. The company emphasizes customer service and provides various promotions and rebates for tire purchases. With over 65 locations, they aim to serve a diverse clientele in the region.
